case_title: ZAK HALE VS. JULIA DE BARTOLO

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-25-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-25-2016 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT AND WAIVES SERVICE IN OPEN COURT. NO COSTS; IFP WAIVER GRANTED. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: J.BERTELSEN. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE ORDER OF EXAMINATION IS DISCHARGED AS TO DEFENDANT JULIA DE BARTOLO, WHO WAS PRESENT FOR THIS MORNING'S PROCEEDINGS. NO APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ZAK HALE. NO PROOF OF SERVICE OF THE OEX. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: KEVIN DOUGHERTY. NOT REPORTED. (D506).
